title: Sentinel-2 reflectance 3-month mosaics, years 2022 onwards
description: Sentinel-2 satellite image mosaics are produced from data provided by MultiSpectral Instruments (MSI) onboard Sentinel-2 satellites. These mosaics covering years 2017 - 2021 have been produced using the current version of Sentinel-2 Global Mosaic-service (https://s2gm.land.copernicus.eu/mosaic-hub) of Copernicus program of European Union. The image acquisition period yearly mosaics have been from the mid-June to the mid-August. The value of pixel of the individual bands is the estimate of ground reflectance, multiplied by coefficient 10000. The RGB-images (bands B08, B04, B03) have been scaled to 8-bit in order to make visualization easier. The value of meta-mosaic is the number of day from the start of year of selected pixel. Pixel size of all mosaics is 10 m. Original Sentinel data CLMS / ESA, mosaic processing by S2GM-service with postprocessing by SYKE. Coordinate system: ETRS-TM35FIN.
